candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; usable as fallback if label changes by year.
COGS, not revenue.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not REVT.

variables.notes: Using the direct revenue line and the duplicate total line as fallback priority labels.

candidates.why: Explicit COGS label; matches direct production/service costs.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS row from candidates.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component, but likely incomplete because other overhead appears separately.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row is present. Candidate list only includes one overhead component and appears to miss another major overhead bucket, 'Other external expenses', visible in the Income Statement preview. Added that row from the full A-column labels to better cover SG&A components while excluding depreciation/amortization/COGS. Manual review recommended because classification of 'Other external expenses' as SG&A may vary. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other external expenses

candidates.why: Capitalized amount is not an R&D expense line; it reduces/offsets expense rather than reporting current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; excluded for PROF XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet net asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet/intangible asset style label, not an expense line.

variables.notes: No clear income statement R&D expense line exists. Candidate rows are capitalization/amortization or balance sheet asset items rather than current R&D expense, so XRD is treated as missing.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable fallback if specific interest expense not available.
Most direct interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense label for lease liabilities; good fallback/prior-year alternative.
Finance-related but not necessarily interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on other liabilities - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not preferred when reported line exists.
Balancing row, not preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific interest-expense rows first, then the broader financial-expenses line as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent/owner equity line exists; here it duplicates parent equity.
Not equity; total balance sheet.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-shareholder equity to avoid double counting MIB. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback only because values are identical and label may vary by year.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest row is present. Total Equity equals equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders, so MIB is treated as zero.
